expected.notes: Student has exactly 11 months of full-time CPT, which does not exceed the 12-month threshold (gt 11 is false), so the rule must not fire.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'fulltime_cpt_opt_risk', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.cpt_fulltime_months gt 11
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
